---
title: "Research"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false

import requests
import pandas as pd

HAL_ID = "raphael-bulle"
URL = f"https://api.archives-ouvertes.fr/search/?q=authIdHal_s:{HAL_ID}&wt=json&fl=title_s,authFullName_s,producedDateY_i,uri_s,docType_s,doiId_s"

data = requests.get(URL).json()
docs = data["response"]["docs"]

pubs = []
for d in docs:
    if d.get("title_s")[0] == "FEniCS Error Estimation (FEniCS-EE)":
        pubs.append({
            "title": d.get("title_s", "Untitled")[0],
            "year": 2021,
            "link": d.get("uri_s", [""]),
            "authors": ", ".join(d.get("authFullName_s", [])),
            "type": d.get("docType_s", "unknown"),
            "doi": d.get("doiId_s", ""),
        })
    else:
        pubs.append({
            "title": d.get("title_s", "Untitled")[0],
            "year": d.get("producedDateY_i", ["?"]),
            "link": d.get("uri_s", ""),
            "authors": ", ".join(d.get("authFullName_s", [])),
            "type": d.get("docType_s", "unknown"),
            "doi": d.get("doiId_s", ""),
        })

pubs.append({"title": "The Human Meniscus Behaves as a Functionally Graded Fractional Porous Medium under Confined Compression Conditions",
             "year": 2021,
             "authors": "Raphaël Bulle, Gioacchino Alotta, Gregorio Marchiori, Matteo Berni, Nicola F. Lopomo, Stefano Zaffagnini, Stéphane P. A. Bordas, Olga Barrera",
             "type": "ART",
             "link": "",
             "doi": "https://doi.org/10.3390/app11209405"})

df = pd.DataFrame(pubs).sort_values("year", ascending=False)
year_list = df["year"].tolist()
df.head()
from IPython.display import Markdown

doctypes = {"UNDEFINED": "✍️ Preprints", "ART": "🗞️ Publications", "SOFTWARE": "💻 Softwares", "THESE": "🎓 Thesis", "REPORT": "📰 Reports"}
out = ""
for type_key, type_val in doctypes.items():
    out += f"## {type_val}\n\n"
    type_df = df[df["type"] == type_key]
    if type_key=="UNDEFINED":
        for _, row in type_df.iterrows():
            out += f"- *{row['title']}*</br>"
            out += f"  {row['authors']}"
            if row['doi']!="":
                out += f" | \nDOI: [{row['doi']}]({row['doi']})"
                if not row["link"]=="":
                    out += f" | \n[HAL]({row['link']})\n\n"
                else:
                    out += "\n\n"
            else:
                out += "\n\n"
    else:
        for year in sorted(set(type_df["year"].tolist()), reverse=True):
            yr_df = type_df[type_df["year"] == year]
            out += f"### {year}\n\n"
            for _, row in yr_df.iterrows():
                out += f"- *{row['title']}*</br>"
                out += f"  {row['authors']}"
                if row['doi']!="":
                    out += f" | \nDOI: [{row['doi']}]({row['doi']})"
                    if not row["link"]=="":
                        out += f" | \n[HAL]({row['link']})\n\n"
                    else:
                        out += "\n\n"
                else:
                    out += "\n\n"

Markdown(out)
```
